ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* The player's jersey number */,
  "position" TEXT /* The player's position */,
  "bats" TEXT /* The player's batting hand */,
  "throws" TEXT /* The player's throwing hand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., AL, NL) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., East, West) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, postseason) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "game_duration" REAL /* Duration of the game in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitching_stats" (
  "pitching_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitching stat */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_pitched" INTEGER /* Number of games pitched by the player */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Number of innings pitched by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits allowed by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs allowed by the player */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Number of earned runs allowed by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs allowed by the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks by the player */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks plus hits per inning pitched by the player */,
  "ground_balls" INTEGER /* Number of ground balls induced by the player */,
  "fly_balls" INTEGER /* Number of fly balls induced by the player */,
  "line_drives" INTEGER /* Number of line drives induced by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitching_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "batting_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting stat */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at bats by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs by the player */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs by the player */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases by the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of doubles hit by the player */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Number of triples hit by the player */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies hit by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batting_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, team manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data is being accessed */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
